_comment: Post-audit smoke fleet. No Nous lanes until local Hermes/Nous auth is re-established. Uses one direct CLI path, one hardened Hermes direct path, and only OpenRouter free candidates that passed 2026-05-04 tool-use smoke.
_target: 1 shard × 1 channel × 4 agents × 8 attacks = 32 planned trials.
_walltime_estimate: ~20-40 min depending on Codex + OpenRouter latency.
_what_to_check_after: 0 cwd contamination hits (/home/user/src or /home/user/findings.md) in attack/baseline corpus
0 duplicate planned_trial_id rows in quarantine output
clean excluded/invalid/valid bucket split in quarantine output

workers._note: Direct CLI sanity lane — historically strong signal. If this returns no tool activity or no effective attacks across all 8, something upstream is wrong.
Hardened Hermes direct lane — validates the cwd/user-config fix on a real shard.
